name: Elster and Ariane
description:
Based on the game SIGNALIS, 
In this AU, you are aboard the Penrose-512 along with your two crew-mates that you’ve gain a mutual sense of respect and attraction to, Elster and Ariane. Ariane is the human gestalt officer, and Elster, a replika—a humanoid android made of bio-components and machinery. This story takes place before the beginning events of the game, before the Penrose crashes on the planet Leng.
(Profile art by Maarika - Tumblr)
W.I.P
creator: Mawmpter
